chatMessages.content: Welcome to the galaxy Beta Test, alright! The Galactic Federation welcomes you to Space Station, wishes you a great success in your journey, and appreciates to have you in our ranks. Remember, completing tasks inside your Commander Academy (Station Roadmap) is vital to stabilize the station, each task has claimable rewards with some Space Gold rewarded too! Also, please feel free to send us your thoughts and feedback via the Suggestion Station located in your Settings tab. Good luck, Commander!

logs: --- COMBAT CYCLE 1 INITIATED ---
Attackers throw 1,027 megawatt laser channels into target coordinates.
Defenders are being attacked under siege. Their offensive HP does not count; only their defense HP (1,266 total DEF) is channeled into 1,408 retaliatory counter-firepower.
Attacker casualties: 15 Interceptor, 25 Assault Drone, 3 Disrupter, 10 Matter Extractor, 1 Missile Launcher.
Defender casualties: 14 Interceptor, 22 Assault Drone, 2 Disrupter, 9 Matter Extractor, 3 Missile Launcher.
🛡️ [Tactical Deflection Force] Attacker had 32.9% HP advantage! Survival security field guaranteed that at least 32.9% of original squads survive.
🛡️ [Tactical Deflection Force] Defender had 45.6% HP advantage! Survival security field guaranteed that at least 45.6% of original squads survive.
=== BATTLEFIELD ORBIT RECOVERY REPORT ===
[Nano-Salvage Array] Planetary defense rigs gathered scrap, reconstructing: 1 Interceptor, 1 Assault Drone, 3 Matter Extractor, 1 Missile Launcher for the Defender.
[Tactical Medical Bay] Offside carrier teams salvaged and re-launched: 1 Interceptor, 1 Assault Drone, 1 Disrupter, 1 Matter Extractor for the Attacker.
--- COMBAT CYCLE 1 INITIATED ---
Attackers throw 1,085 megawatt laser channels into target coordinates.
Defenders are being attacked under siege. Their offensive HP does not count; only their defense HP (50 total DEF) is channeled into 49 retaliatory counter-firepower.
Attacker casualties: 1 Interceptor, 3 Assault Drone.
Defender casualties: 1 Settlement Ship.

💥 [TACTICAL OVERWHELM] Attacker's initial force HP of 1,149 exceeded 150% more than the defender's total involved HP (57). Absolute overwhelm triggered; all defender defending forces have been wiped out with ZERO survivors!
--- SECURE TELEMETRY SCAN ---
Hostiles detected: 50 defending HP, but our fleet attack power (600) is sufficient to cover reconnaissance safety.
Complete layout telemetry logged with zero drone losses.

newsEvents.title: Galactic Server Active
newsEvents.content: The seasonal space arena is open. Recruit commanders, fortify your moonbases, and seize dominion of the sector!
